name: recent-research
description: Product-style skill for recent public signal research using deterministic collectors and host web search.

interface.shortDescription: Research recent public signals for a topic.
interface.longDescription: A product-style research skill that gathers recent public evidence from low-friction sources such as GitHub, Hacker News, and Reddit, then guides the agent to synthesize a concise source-grounded brief with gaps and interpretation separated.
defaultPrompt: Use Recent Research to brief me on recent public signals for this topic.
Use Recent Research to compare recent developer chatter around two products.
